description:
Join us on Wednesday, July 8, from 4-7 PM at Whispering Vine South Creek for a La Vieille Ferme tasting featuring Rouge, White and Rosé from one of France's favorite everyday wine labels.

For years, La Vieille Ferme has been one of the best values in the wine world. Produced by the Perrin family—renowned for their expertise in the Rhône Valley—it consistently overdelivers for the price.

Tasting Fee: $10 per person (Buy a tasting bottle and your fee is refunded.)

Featured Tasting Wines:

  • La Vieille Ferme Rouge 2024 - Fresh southern French red with cassis, crushed strawberry, small berries, soft spice and velvety tannins.
  • La Vieille Ferme White 2025 - Bright white with white peach, jasmine, mimosa blossom, nectarine, saline lift and yuzu freshness.
  • La Vieille Ferme Rosé - Powder-pink rosé with roses, red fruit, strawberry, peach, lively acidity and a mineral finish.

Special Bottle Deal: La Vieille Ferme Rosé magnums will also be available for $19.99. They are the perfect size for entertaining, BBQs and lake days.

Buy a tasting bottle and your fee is refunded.
title: La Vieille Ferme Tasting
